name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly expands the scope of the research, particularly in the computational and visualization steps. While the first step of the old plan covers some of the theoretical ground, the new plan introduces specific requirements for stochastic stress testing, reheating calculations, and spectral index derivations that were not present in the original plan. The structure of the computational and visualization tasks has been completely reorganized into more granular, specialized steps. Therefore, it is safer and more efficient to restart the execution to ensure all new requirements are met systematically.
